title: Landing page hero renders with Arabic RTL hero text visible
description: Verifies the public landing page loads successfully and displays visible Arabic hero content.

steps.description: Verify visible Arabic text is present in the hero area
Verify element "main CTA button" is visible

title: Scroll through landing page sections and confirm features content is visible
description: Verifies the user can scroll the landing page and see multiple sections (hero and features) rendered.

steps.description: Scroll to "bottom of the landing page"
Verify element "main CTA button" is visible

title: Main CTA from landing page routes to signup
description: Verifies clicking the main call-to-action from the landing page routes to the signup page.

steps.description: Verify element "main CTA button" is visible

title: Fallback path: landing page CTA can route to login prompt instead of signup
description: Verifies that if the CTA leads to login instead of signup, the login page is shown with a login form.

steps.description: Verify element "main CTA button" is visible

title: Landing page remains usable after repeated scrolling (CTA still visible and clickable)
description: Verifies basic stability of interactive UI elements after scrolling through sections.

steps.description: Verify element "main CTA button" is visible

title: Login succeeds and redirects to dashboard
description: Verifies that a user can log in with valid credentials and is redirected to the teacher dashboard.

title: After login, user can navigate to settings via UI and remain authenticated
description: Verifies that an authenticated user can reach settings from the dashboard without being redirected back to login.

title: Invalid password shows error and stays on login
description: Verifies that login fails with incorrect credentials and the user remains on /login with a visible error message.

title: Session persists when navigating from dashboard to homework list
description: Verifies that after logging in, navigating to another protected route remains authenticated and does not redirect to login.

title: Dashboard overview renders for authenticated teacher
description: Verifies an authenticated user can load the teacher dashboard overview page successfully.

title: Navigate from dashboard to homework list using in-app navigation
description: Verifies the teacher can move from the dashboard overview to the homework list via visible navigation controls.

steps.description: Click on "Homeworks" in the dashboard navigation

title: Homework list page shows empty state when no homeworks exist
description: Verifies the homework list page communicates an empty state and provides a clear call-to-action to create homework.

steps.description: Click on "Homeworks" in the dashboard navigation

title: Homework list page shows homework cards when homeworks exist
description: Verifies the homework list page renders homework cards instead of the empty state for accounts with existing homeworks.

steps.description: Click on "Homeworks" in the dashboard navigation
Verify text "No homeworks" is not visible

title: Empty state CTA navigates to create homework page
description: Verifies the empty state call-to-action on the homework list takes the user to the create homework page.

steps.description: Click on "Homeworks" in the dashboard navigation

title: Create page navigation is accessible from homework list (non-empty list)
description: Verifies that when homeworks exist, the homework list still provides a visible path to create a new homework.

steps.description: Click on "Homeworks" in the dashboard navigation

title: Create and save a new homework with one multiple-choice question, then verify it appears in homework list
description: Verifies a teacher can create a homework with required multiple-choice fields, save/publish it, and see it listed on /dashboard/hw.

steps.description: Click on "Create" or "Create Homework" in the dashboard navigation
Type "Homework E2E - MCQ 1" into the title field

title: Add a multiple-choice question with choices and a correct answer, then Save
description: Verifies the create page supports adding an MCQ, entering question/choices, selecting a correct answer, and saving without validation errors.

steps.description: Click on "Create" or "Create Homework" in the dashboard navigation
Click on the "Add Question" or "Add Multiple-Choice Question" button

title: Complete MCQ fields and Save/Publish, then navigate to Homework list
description: Verifies that after saving/publishing from the create page, the user can reach /dashboard/hw and see the newly created homework card.

steps.description: Click on "Create" or "Create Homework" in the dashboard navigation

title: Validation: attempt to Save with empty title shows title error
description: Verifies the title field is required and a visible validation message appears when saving without a title.

steps.description: Click on "Create" or "Create Homework" in the dashboard navigation

title: Validation: empty title shows an explicit required message near the title field
description: Verifies that after trying to save without a title, a visible error message indicates the title is required.

steps.description: Click on "Create" or "Create Homework" in the dashboard navigation
Verify text "Title is required" is visible
Verify element "title field error message" is visible

title: Validation: add a question but do not mark a correct answer, then Save shows correct-answer error
description: Verifies the MCQ requires selecting a correct answer and shows a visible validation error when missing.

steps.description: Click on "Create" or "Create Homework" in the dashboard navigation
Click on the "Add Question" or "Add Multiple-Choice Question" button

title: Validation: correct-answer required message is visible after Save attempt
description: Verifies that saving an MCQ without a marked correct answer surfaces a clear visible error message.

steps.description: Click on "Create" or "Create Homework" in the dashboard navigation
Verify text "Correct answer is required" is visible

title: View results list for a homework and see student name and score
description: Verifies a teacher can open a homework’s results and see a visible list of submissions with student name and score.

steps.description: Click on a homework card on the dashboard
Click the "View Results" button on the homework card

title: Results page shows a list of student submissions
description: Verifies the results view renders a visible submissions list for the selected homework.

steps.description: Click on a homework card on the dashboard
Click the "View Results" button on the homework card

title: Results page shows student name and score columns/fields
description: Verifies that at least one submission entry displays both a student name and a score value on the results page.

steps.description: Click on a homework card on the dashboard
Click the "View Results" button on the homework card

title: Results ranking is displayed (sorted by score)
description: Verifies the results page visibly communicates a ranking/order by score (e.g., a Rank indicator or ordered list).

steps.description: Click on a homework card on the dashboard
Click the "View Results" button on the homework card

title: Solved vs unsolved statistics are visible on results page
description: Verifies the results view includes visible solved and unsolved counts/statistics for the homework.

steps.description: Click on a homework card on the dashboard
Click the "View Results" button on the homework card

title: Unsolved count is visible alongside solved count
description: Verifies the results view includes an unsolved indicator/count as a separate visible metric.

steps.description: Click on a homework card on the dashboard
Click the "View Results" button on the homework card

title: Update personal information and see success confirmation
description: Verifies a teacher can update profile information from Settings and sees a visible success confirmation.

steps.description: Click on "Settings" from the dashboard navigation/menu
Fill "Updated Test Name" into the name/full name field
Click on the "Update personal information" or "Save" button
Verify text "Success" or "Profile updated" is visible

title: Update personal information persists on page reload within Settings
description: Verifies updated profile data remains visible after saving and reloading the Settings page.

steps.description: Click on "Settings" from the dashboard navigation/menu
Fill "Persistent Name Check" into the name/full name field
Click on the "Update personal information" or "Save" button
Verify text "Success" or "Profile updated" is visible
Verify text "Persistent Name Check" is visible

title: Toggle homework behavior settings and see save confirmation
description: Verifies homework behavior toggles can be changed in Settings and saved successfully.

steps.description: Click on "Settings" from the dashboard navigation/menu
Click on a homework behavior toggle (for example: auto-publish, allow retries, show answers, or similar) to change its state
Click on the "Save" or "Submit changes" button for behavior settings
Verify text "Success" or "Settings saved" is visible

title: Homework behavior setting reflected when navigating to Create Homework
description: Verifies a saved behavior setting is reflected in the Create Homework page UI defaults.

steps.description: Click on "Settings" from the dashboard navigation/menu
Click on a homework behavior toggle to change its state (choose one with a clear on/off label)
Click on the "Save" or "Submit changes" button for behavior settings
Verify text "Success" or "Settings saved" is visible
Click on "Create" or "Create Homework" from the dashboard navigation/menu
Verify the corresponding behavior option appears in the expected state (for example: enabled/disabled label or checked/unchecked indicator)

title: Logout with confirmation redirects to Login
description: Verifies logout requires confirmation and returns the user to the login page after confirming.

steps.description: Click on "Settings" from the dashboard navigation/menu
Verify text "Are you sure" or "Confirm logout" is visible
Click on the "Confirm" or "Yes, log out" button

title: Logout confirmation can be canceled and user stays in Settings
description: Verifies canceling the logout confirmation keeps the user in Settings and does not log them out.

steps.description: Click on "Settings" from the dashboard navigation/menu
Verify text "Confirm logout" or "Are you sure" is visible

title: Delete account flow can be canceled and account remains active
description: Verifies canceling the delete account confirmation leaves the account active and user remains in Settings.

steps.description: Click on "Settings" from the dashboard navigation/menu
Verify text "This action cannot be undone" or "Delete your account" is visible

title: Confirm delete account redirects away from authenticated area
description: Verifies confirming account deletion redirects the user to a public route after deletion completes.

steps.description: Click on "Settings" from the dashboard navigation/menu
Verify text "This action cannot be undone" or "Delete your account" is visible
Click on the "Confirm" or "Yes, delete" button
Verify URL contains "/signup" or verify URL contains "/"

title: Cross-account access isolation: Teacher B cannot see Teacher A homework in list
description: Ensures a second teacher account cannot access or view another teacher’s homework from the homework list area.

steps.description: Click on "Homeworks" (or "HW") in the dashboard navigation

title: Protected page access after login: teacher can reach /dashboard/hw
description: Confirms that an authenticated user can access a protected route and see the expected page state.

steps.description: Click on "Homeworks" (or "HW") in the dashboard navigation

title: Create homework validation: prevent saving with zero questions (if UI allows)
description: Verifies explicit validation or handling when attempting to save/publish a homework without any questions.

steps.description: Click on "Create" in the dashboard navigation
Verify text "Add at least one question" is visible

title: Create homework validation: required fields prevent save when empty
description: Checks that required homework fields (e.g., title) show visible validation errors when left blank.

steps.description: Click on "Create" in the dashboard navigation
Verify text "Title is required" is visible

title: Invalid login credentials show error and do not enter dashboard
description: Ensures incorrect credentials are rejected with a visible error and no redirect to protected routes.

steps.description: Verify text "Invalid email or password" is visible

title: Settings page is protected and loads only after login
description: Validates that /dashboard/settings requires authentication and renders expected settings UI for logged-in users.

steps.description: Click on "Settings" in the dashboard navigation

title: RTL and Arabic UI on landing page (/)
description: Verifies the landing page shows Arabic UI content and presents an RTL-oriented layout.

steps.description: Verify the primary navigation menu is visible
Verify the hero section is visible

title: RTL and Arabic UI on Login page (/login)
description: Verifies the login page renders Arabic labels and appears RTL-oriented.

title: RTL and Arabic UI on Signup page (/signup)
description: Verifies the signup page renders Arabic labels and appears RTL-oriented.

title: RTL and Arabic UI on Teacher Dashboard (/dashboard) after login
description: Verifies the teacher dashboard loads after login and displays Arabic UI in an RTL-oriented layout.

steps.description: Verify the sidebar menu is visible

title: RTL and Arabic UI on Create Homework (/dashboard/create) after login
description: Verifies the create homework page loads after login and key controls are visible in an RTL-oriented UI.

steps.description: Click on "Create" in the dashboard navigation
Verify the homework creation form is visible

title: RTL and Arabic UI on Homework list (/dashboard/hw) after login
description: Verifies the homework list page loads after login and list/table layout appears usable under RTL UI.

steps.description: Click on "Homeworks" in the dashboard navigation
Verify the homework list is visible

title: RTL and Arabic UI on Settings (/dashboard/settings) after login
description: Verifies the settings page loads after login and presents Arabic UI in an RTL-oriented layout.

steps.description: Click on "Settings" in the dashboard navigation
Verify the account settings section is visible
